inbox.title: Tickets
inbox.searchPlaceholder: Search inbox — ID, title, requester, status…
inbox.noTicketsDesc: New requests will appear here when assigned to you.
inbox.sortReverseHint: Tap the same field again to reverse.

ticketRow.declinedTitle: Customer declined the proposed resolution. This clears when you re-resolve the ticket.

quickActions.transferForYouDesc: {{name}} wants to transfer this ticket to you. Reason: {{reason}}{{note}}. The ticket stays with them until you respond.
quickActions.transferPending: Transfer pending — waiting for {{name}} to accept. You remain the assignee.
quickActions.assignHint: Takes the ticket, sets it to In progress, and starts your SLA clock from creation time.

rightRail.statusPriorityHint: Change selections below, then confirm to save. Transitions follow your workflow rules.
rightRail.assignToEdit: Assign this ticket to yourself to change status and priority.
rightRail.solutionSummaryHint: Customer-visible. They will review this before closing the request.
rightRail.solutionPlaceholder: e.g. VPN profile updated and connection verified on your device.
rightRail.resolutionNoteMin: Add at least {{min}} characters describing the solution.
rightRail.closeRequestHint: Close without customer approval for invalid, duplicate, or no-response cases.
rightRail.closeSelectHint: Select why you are closing this request. This cannot be undone.
rightRail.transferHint: Request handoff to another agent. They must accept before the ticket moves.
rightRail.transferFormHint: Choose an agent and reason. They will be notified immediately.
rightRail.transferNotePlaceholder: Short summary for the transfer request…
rightRail.internalMessagePlaceholder: Extra internal note for the team — use @email to mention colleagues…
rightRail.transferApprovalDesc: {{name}} wants to transfer this ticket to you. Reason: {{reason}}{{note}}.
rightRail.slaHint: Resolution target is from ticket creation. Paused = clock stopped while waiting on the customer.

composer.assigneeOnlyReply: Only the assigned agent can reply to the customer.
composer.assigneeOnlyWorklog: Only the assigned agent can log work.
composer.assigneeOnlyAttach: Only the assigned agent can attach files.
composer.placeholderReply: Write the reply the customer will see…
composer.placeholderInternal: Add an internal note for the team (@ to mention)…
composer.worklogSummaryPlaceholder: Summarize work completed, key actions, and outcome.
composer.mentionHint: Use @mentions to notify teammates or managers. Mentions may also share ticket visibility with the mentioned teammate when needed.
composer.internalOnly: Internal only — not visible to the customer.

timeline.title: Conversation & activity
timeline.noActivityDesc: Status changes, assignments, worklogs, attachments, and system events will appear here.

systemMessages.customerApproved: Customer approved the solution — ticket closed

worklog.title: Worklog Summary
worklog.subtitle: Track your activity, time usage, and productivity
worklog.periodHint: Dashboard reflects the period selected below.
worklog.distributionSub: Share of logged time by activity type

capacity.manager: This agent is at their open-ticket limit. Choose another assignee or contact your manager to review team workload.
capacity.self: You're at your open-ticket limit. Contact your manager to review your workload before taking more tickets.
capacity.transfer: That agent is at their open-ticket limit. Choose another colleague or contact your manager to review workload.
capacity.assign: This agent is at their open-ticket limit. Choose another agent or contact your manager to review workload.
capacity.peerWarning: At open-ticket limit — choose another agent or contact your manager to review workload.
